title: Function Expression : JavaScript
summary: JavaScript is a dynamic and versatile programming language that allows developers to create complex and dynamic applications. One of the key features of JavaScript is its ability to use functions as first-class citizens. This means that functions can be assigned to variables, passed as arguments to other functions, and even returned as values from functions…
content: JavaScript is a dynamic and versatile programming language that allows developers to create complex and dynamic applications. One of the key features of JavaScript is its ability to use functions as first-class citizens. This means that functions can be assigned to variables, passed as arguments to other functions, and even returned as values from functions. In this article, we’ll take a closer look at function expressions in JavaScript and explore how they can be used in your code.
